title: Yale P-77-BLX-PB-60 - Traditional Nightlatch - 60mm - Brass Finish - Standard Security
description: From the manufacturer High Security? We've got it! Look for the maximum security nightlatches such as our Yale BS range created to resist common types of attacks. Security up to standards If you rely on the nightlatch as mains to keep the door secured, make sure you pick something up to current standards. BSI ensures to create standards that make product excellence a must. The Secured by Design scheme is working to reduce crime through sustainable design of products. What to consider when buying a nightlatch Which size do I need? Yale Nightlatches come in two different backset sizes that fit different door types. Make sure you measure the door before you purchase one. The backset on a night latch is the distance from the centre of the keyhole to the edge of your door. Available sizes: Narrow width for glazed panel doors - 40 mm; Standard width for solid doors - 60 mm; Types of Locking Snib Button Locking The snib button can be used for locking the door or for holding back the latch when needed. Auto Deadlocking This type of nightlatch locks the door automatically. Turn of Key Locking The door can be locked with a key from the inside. This is ideal for glazed doors.
